COMMERCIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

Landlord:
Meridian Business Park LLC

Tenant:
Northbrook Consulting Inc.

1. Term. Five-year term beginning January 1, 2027, with no automatic renewal.

2. Rent. Monthly Rent: $4,200.00, payable on the first business day of each month.

3. Late Fee. A late fee of 4% applies to any payment received more than 5 business days after the due date.

4. Entry. Landlord may enter the leased premises with 48 hours notice for inspection, maintenance, or showing to prospective tenants.
